description.initial: The northeastern waters mark the boundary between the island's influence and the normal ocean. Here, you can see the contrast: the perfect, glowing waters near the island fade into the natural, imperfect ocean you know. Reality waits just beyond the island's reach.
description.return: The northeastern waters. The boundary between perfection and reality.
description.atmospheric: The island's influence fades where the open ocean begins. Two waters, side by side.

interactables.name: Reality's Edge
interactables.examineText: A visible line in the water where the island's influence ends. On one side, unnatural perfection. On the other, the real ocean with its chaos and beauty.
